data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Accepted unsigned per owner decision: all 10 children implemented + closed (9 signed); only b593 is uncertified because bug dash-lure-slag (completion-verifier rejects a top-level JSON array) blocks its attestation. b593's pyproject implementation is complete and verified; dash-lure-slag remains open as tracked follow-up (discovered_from this epic). Fixing it is out-of-scope for this OSS-readiness epic.". Session: 25d6ed9e3.
